'''âd-s-t-p''' ('''kadastepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobble|jobble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobble|jobble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-s-t-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadastepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidastepoko|thidastepoko]] || [[word:jidastepoko|jidastepoko]] || [[word:shidastepoko|shidastepoko]] || [[word:kidastepoko|kidastepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudastepoko|thuthudastepoko]] || [[word:jujudastepoko|jujudastepoko]] || [[word:shushudastepoko|shushudastepoko]] || [[word:kukudastepoko|kukudastepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudastepoko|thudastepoko]] || [[word:judastepoko|judastepoko]] || [[word:shudastepoko|shudastepoko]] || [[word:kudastepoko|kudastepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudastepoko|thudastepoko]] || [[word:judastepoko|judastepoko]] || [[word:shudastepoko|shudastepoko]] || [[word:kudastepoko|kudastepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedastepoko|thedastepoko]] || [[word:jedastepoko|jedastepoko]] || [[word:shedastepoko|shedastepoko]] || [[word:kedastepoko|kedastepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodastepoko|thothodastepoko]] || [[word:jojodastepoko|jojodastepoko]] || [[word:shoshodastepoko|shoshodastepoko]] || [[word:kokodastepoko|kokodastepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodastepoko|thodastepoko]] || [[word:jodastepoko|jodastepoko]] || [[word:shodastepoko|shodastepoko]] || [[word:kodastepoko|kodastepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodastepoko|thodastepoko]] || [[word:jodastepoko|jodastepoko]] || [[word:shodastepoko|shodastepoko]] || [[word:kodastepoko|kodastepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdastepoko|thĂŠdastepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdastepoko|jĂŠdastepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdastepoko|shĂŠdastepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdastepoko|kĂŠdastepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadastepoko|thathadastepoko]] || [[word:jajadastepoko|jajadastepoko]] || [[word:shashadastepoko|shashadastepoko]] || [[word:kakadastepoko|kakadastepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadastepoko|thadastepoko]] || [[word:jadastepoko|jadastepoko]] || [[word:shadastepoko|shadastepoko]] || [[word:kadastepoko|kadastepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadastepoko|thadastepoko]] || [[word:jadastepoko|jadastepoko]] || [[word:shadastepoko|shadastepoko]] || [[word:kadastepoko|kadastepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadastepithi|shadastepithi]] || [[word:shadastepiji|shadastepiji]] || [[word:shadastepishi|shadastepishi]] || [[word:shadastepiki|shadastepiki]]
